data.title: Bitcoin, Ethereum, XRP, Dogecoin prices drop. Bitcoin at $92,460.85, Ethereum $3,156.33, XRP $2.10, Dogecoin $0.1480. Trading volume falls 19%. Liquidations hit $266 million.
data.description: Major cryptocurrencies experienced a decline amidst expectations of interest rate cuts. At 8:25 p.m. ET, Bitcoin fell by 1.04% to $92,460.85, Ethereum dropped by 1.77% to $3,156.33, XRP decreased by 4.30% to $2.10, Solana fell by 4.40% to $139.58, and Dogecoin decreased by 2.75% to $0.1480. Bitcoin consolidated in the $91,000-$92,000 range with a 19% decrease in trading volume. Ethereum faced strong rejection near $3,220 and dropped to $3,070 before rebounding. Cryptocurrency-linked stocks like Strategy Inc. and Coinbase Global Inc. closed down by 1.26% and 1.04% during regular trading. Cryptocurrency liquidations amounted to $266 million in the last 24 hours, with long liquidations nearing $80 million. Over $440 million in Bitcoin short positions faced the risk of liquidation if Bitcoin surpassed $95,000.

data.title: China's 15th Five-Year Plan to offer global growth opportunities. Plan for 2026-30 aims to boost China's development.
data.description: The recent unveiling of China's 15th Five-Year Plan, scheduled for 2026-2030, is expected to inject new energy into global growth. The plan, announced in Beijing, aims to propel the country's development while creating substantial opportunities for advancement. With a target timeframe spanning five years, from 2026 to 2030, the plan signifies China's strategic vision for the future and holds promise for innovative initiatives that could impact various sectors on a global scale.

data.title: Leon Stok from IBM elected Chair of Si2 Board for 2025–2026 term. Has been on Si2 Board since 2007. Drives design and verification at IBM.
data.description: In Austin, Texas, the Silicon Integration Initiative (Si2) declared that Dr. Leon Stok, VP of Electronic Design Automation at IBM, has been selected as Chair of the Si2 Board of Directors for the remainder of the 2025–2026 term. Dr. Stok, a Si2 Board Member since 2007 and former Board Chair, supervises a team at IBM that provides top-notch design and verification flows and tools for the creation of semiconductor products.
SALESFORCE DECLARES QUARTERLY DIVIDEND OF $0.416 PER SHARE

data.title: Meta's stocks rise as reports suggest a potential 30% cut in metaverse budget, particularly in Reality Labs. Shareholders back the move.
data.description: Reportedly, Meta is losing interest in the metaverse and is set to reduce its virtual reality research department, Reality Labs, by 30%. Shareholders appear to be in favor of this decision.

data.title: Ark Invest led by Cathie Wood sold 7,478 Tesla shares on Thursday valued at $3.4 million while purchasing ARK 21Shares Bitcoin ETF, amidst market shifts. Tesla's stock closed at $454.53 with a 1.74% increase, underperforming major indices. Tesla still remains Ark's top holding at $949.82 million, representing 12.36% of the portfolio.
data.description: Cathie Wood's Ark Invest made significant trades, selling 7,478 shares of Tesla valued at $3.4 million, as Tesla's stock closed at $454.53, up by 1.74%. Despite underperformance compared to major indices, Ark retains Tesla as its top holding, valued at $949.82 million, comprising 12.36% of the portfolio. Additionally, Ark reduced its holdings in Meta Platforms, while buying ARK 21Shares Bitcoin ETF amid evolving market conditions in the tech and crypto sectors. This strategic shift comes amidst Tesla's advancements in autonomous driving, offering potential growth in the Robotaxi sector. For the full story, visit Benzinga.com.

data.title: Winder Farms brings back eggnog at Costco, expanding its marketing channels after family acquisition.
data.description: In Salt Lake City on December 4, 2025, Winder Farms, now back in the hands of the Winder family, has been actively broadening its marketing reach. One notable move is the introduction of its popular eggnog at Costco outlets. This marks a significant step for the company post-acquisition, showcasing its commitment to growth and expansion.

data.title: China-France cooperation sees success with mutual commitment. French President Macron on 4th state visit to China.
data.description: On December 4, 2025, during French President Emmanuel Macron's fourth state visit to China, a recent article by CGTN discusses the successful bilateral cooperation between China and France. The article emphasizes the mutual commitment from both nations to enhance strategic cooperation. This visit further underscores the strengthened ties between the two countries.

data.title: FIDO Alliance launches digital credentials initiative to accelerate secure identity ecosystem.- New initiative to simplify and secure interactions.- Aims to establish trusted, interoperable identity wallet ecosystem.
data.description: In Mountain View, California, the FIDO Alliance has introduced a digital credentials initiative to promote the use of verifiable digital credentials and identity wallets. This expansion of their mission aims to facilitate secure online and in-person interactions. The initiative plans to establish a reliable and compatible identity wallet ecosystem. The FIDO Alliance will spearhead this project through their new Digital C initiative.

data.title: 3rd Overseas Chinese Talent Conference held in Fuzhou, gathering overseas Chinese of Fujian origin from 39 countries.
data.description: From December 1-3, the 3rd Overseas Chinese Talent Conference for Development took place in Fuzhou, the capital city of Fujian Province, China. The event brought together overseas Chinese individuals of Fujian descent from 39 different countries and regions alongside the Minjiang River.

data.title: Investor rights firm Halper Sadeh LLC urges EB and SNCR shareholders to discuss their rights promptly regarding securities laws violations.
data.description: Investor rights law firm Halper Sadeh LLC is urging shareholders to act promptly concerning potential violations of federal securities laws by certain companies. Shareholders are advised to get in touch with the firm without delay as time to enforce their rights may be limited. The investigation being conducted by the law firm involves multiple companies and is based in New York. The announcement was made on December 4, 2025.
